title: Grilled Chicken
fullDescription: Perfectly grilled chicken marinated with special spices and herbs, served with fresh salad and sauce.

title: Beef Steak
fullDescription: Premium beef steak cooked to perfection with rich flavors, served with mashed potatoes and vegetables.

title: Pasta Alfredo
fullDescription: Delicious creamy Alfredo pasta made with fresh cream, cheese, and herbs for a rich taste.

title: Cheese Burger
fullDescription: A double-layered juicy beef burger topped with melted cheese, lettuce, and special sauce.

title: Chicken Pizza
fullDescription: Stone-baked pizza topped with chicken, mozzarella cheese, olives, and fresh herbs.

title: Vegetable Salad
fullDescription: A healthy mix of fresh vegetables including lettuce, cucumber, tomato, and olive oil dressing.

title: Fried Rice
fullDescription: Delicious fried rice cooked with vegetables, egg, and special soy sauce seasoning.

title: Chocolate Dessert
fullDescription: Rich and moist chocolate cake layered with creamy chocolate frosting and toppings.
